info.description: This is a a public Waves Data Services API documentation. The goal of the API is to provide a simple and convenient way to get data from Waves blockchain.
info.title: Waves Data Service

parameters.description: Address. In XOR relation with addresses and queries.
parameters.name: address

parameters.description: Search by array of address. In XOR relation with address and queries.
parameters.name: addresses

parameters.description: Search by array of addressOrAlias. In XOR relation with address and addresses.
parameters.name: queries

parameters.description: Show broken aliases (taken by several people)
parameters.name: showBroken

200.description: List of aliases

get.summary: Get a list of aliases

showBroken.description: Show broken aliases (taken by several people)

200.description: List of aliases

post.summary: Get a list of aliases

parameters.description: alias itself
parameters.name: alias

200.description: Alias and address. Alias cam be broken (taken by several people), in which case `address` returns null.

get.summary: Get address for alias

parameters.description: Asset IDs array
parameters.name: ids

parameters.description: Examples: WAVES, BTC, \*. A wildcard request **ticker=***  returns all assets with tickers.
parameters.name: ticker

parameters.description: Assets prefix-search by the query in asset names, tickers, id.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: After which assets its should search
parameters.name: after

parameters.description: How many Assets to await in response.
parameters.name: limit

200.description: List of Assets

get.summary: Get a list of assets info from a list of IDs

limit.description: How many Assets to await in response.

search.description: Assets prefix-search by the query in asset names, tickers, id.

ticker.description: Examples: WAVES, BTC, \*. A wildcard request **ticker=***  returns all assets with tickers.

parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Time range filter, end. Defaults to now. (ISO-8601 or timestamp in milliseconds, UTC)
parameters.name: timeEnd

parameters.description: Candle interval. One of 1M, 1w, 1d, 12h, 6h, 4h, 3h, 2h, 1h, 30m, 15m, 5m, 1m.
parameters.name: interval

parameters.description: Matcher address
parameters.name: matcher

200.description: List of Candles.</br>time - candle open time</br>timeClose - candle close time

get.summary: Get candles by amount and price assets. Maximum amount of candles in response – 1440.

parameters.description: Matcher address
parameters.name: matcher

parameters.description: `{amountAsset}/{priceAsset}` strings list
parameters.name: pairs

parameters.description: For searching pairs, that have the `search_by_asset` in asset names, tickers, id of one asset of the pair.
parameters.name: search_by_asset

parameters.description: For searching pairs, that have the `search_by_asset` in asset names, tickers, id of one asset of the pair.
parameters.name: search_by_assets

parameters.description: Whether to search assets of pairs exactly or not. Parameter position is corresponds to asset position.
parameters.name: match_exactly

parameters.description: How many pairs to await in response.
parameters.name: limit

200.description: List of Pairs info

400.description: If assets order in one of the pairs is incorrect or at least on of the assets does not exist

get.summary: 1) Get list of pairs info by serialized pairs list; 2) Get all list of pairs info by limit (sort by volume in WAVES)
